title: As Israel Pounds Lebanon, Thousands of Syrians There Flee Back Home
summary_full: “I felt great fear and I ran,” says one of thousands of Syrians who are leaving what had been a relatively safe refuge during the war in Syria.
summary_public: “I felt great fear and I ran,” says one of thousands of Syrians who are leaving what had been a relatively safe refuge during the war in Syria.
